input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.12.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.12.1
            TITLE: the following procedure will be used in determining penalties:

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.12.1: The following procedure will be used in determining penalties:
S.3.12.1 The following procedure will be used in determining penalties: 
a. Penalty A will be calculated using procedure Penalty Method A - Fixed Point Deductions 
b. Penalty B will be calculated using procedure Penalty Method B – Adjusted Cost 
Additions 
c. The higher of the two penalties will be applied against the Cost Event score 
• Penalty A expressed in points will be deducted from the Cost Event score 
• Penalty B expressed in dollars will be added to the Adjusted Cost of the vehicle

final_answer: rule S.3.12.1: The following procedure will be used in determining penalties: S.3.12.1 The following procedure will be used in determining penalties: a. Penalty A will be calculated using procedure Penalty Method A - Fixed Point Deductions b. Penalty B will be calculated using procedure Penalty Method B – Adjusted Cost Additions c. The higher of the two penalties will be applied against the Cost Event score • Penalty A expressed in points will be deducted from the Cost Event score • Penalty B expressed in dollars will be added to the Adjusted Cost of the vehicle
